events.title: Coffee & Community at Lakeside St. ☕
events.description:
Come join the first meetup for 608 Social Club (20s & 30s)!

This group is all about creating a space where people in their 20s and 30s can meet new people and build real community through low-key hangouts.

For our first meetup, we’ll keep it simple with coffee and conversation. Feel free to stop by, grab a drink, and hang out for a bit. Whether you’re new to Madison or have lived here a while and just want to meet more people, you’re welcome.

I’ll grab a table when I get there. Feel free t...

events.title: 🥞 🌈✨ Optional: Drag Bingo + Brunch | 608 Social Club (20s & 30s)
events.description:
For anyone in the mood for something fun and a little more high-energy, there’s a drag bingo + brunch happening at Merchant!

Miss Bianca Lynn Breeze is bringing bingo, performances, and a full show, so it should be a really fun time. Whether you’re coming for the queens, the brunch, or just the vibes, this is a great option if you’re looking to mix things up 💖

Doors open at 11:00 AM and the show starts at 12:00 PM, so let’s plan to meet right when doors open to grab seats together.

🪩 **Tic...

events.title: 🍸✨ Chill Drinks + Meet New People | 608 Social Club (20s & 30s)
events.description:
If you’re in your 20s or 30s and looking to meet new people in Madison, come hang out for a relaxed drinks night.

This is a relaxed, social meetup with no pressure, no cliques, just good vibes and conversation. Come as you are, you’re welcome here 🤍

🍹 Come and go whenever
🤎 Most people will be coming solo

Whether you’re new or have been to an event before, it’s an easy space to show up and connect.

I’ll post what I’m wearing so you can find the group!

events.title: 🌿🤍 Arboretum Walk + Meet New People | 608 Social Club (20s & 30s)
events.description:
Join us for a relaxed walk and a chance to connect with new people in a welcoming, low key space.

We’ll walk about 2 miles at an easy pace and take time to chat along the way. Most people come solo, so you’re not the only one 🤍

🌿 Free to visit
👟 Wear comfortable closed toe shoes, trails may be muddy

If people are up for it, we can grab coffee or food after

Library Yarns Stitch group
events.description:
If you enjoy knitting, crochet, embroidery, or another fiber or needlecraft, please join us at a (mostly) weekly, drop-in stitching circle hosted by the library.

Meet up with other fiber art enthusiasts, learn new techniques, exchange ideas, or find inspiration for your next project.

In warmer weather,, we may meet outside on the lawn behind the library. Bring a lawn chair and your project. In case of cold or rainy (or too hot!) weather, the group will meet in the library’s Conference Room....

events.title: HWY 1 Yarn Crafting
events.description:
This week we'll be meeting at the excellent Burrito place HWY 1. It's in the old Miko Poke location, and since Meetup hasn't updated their maps since 2019 or so, it doesn't have the updated restaurant name, but the address should still get you there. Tables are very normal at HWY 1, and we meet there during happy hour (a happy coincidence!), which means half off drinks or nachos!

So grab your latest greatest handiwork project, and come hang out with us for an evening!

events.title: Forage Kitchen Yarn Crafting
events.description:
Greetings!

This week we're meeting at Forage Kitchen in Hilldale! It is located in the middle of Hilldale (in the cut-through section near Hollander), and serves healthy delicious grain bowls and salads (they are card-only).

So come and join us if you'd like, just bring something to work on and your best human impression!

events.title: Beginner's Workshop
events.description:
Looking to start a yarn craft, but not sure where to begin?

Then this, dear potential friend, is the meetup for you!

This is one of our occasional Beginner's Workshops, which are set up mostly like our normal meetups, except that some of us are ready and willing to teach new people new things, or guide people through relearning an old skill. It's also just a great chance to work on a hobby around other people with similar interests.

All we ask of new yarn crafters is that you bring your ow...

events.title: Sweetgreen Yarn Crafting
events.description: Hello Friends! We have found a new location to add! And guess what it's ANOTHER place with food in bowls! I love those. Which is good, because they're a lot of the restaurants that fit our needs. This particular one is Sweetgreen, which is in Hilldale at the end--I have to put the Great Dane as the location, though, since Meetup's location-setter is garbage. Hello friends,

This week we're going to patronize the Panera Bread on West Washington. They serve delicious sandwiches and overpriced cookies, as you probably know. Anyway, we are going to meet there, and bring our yarn and get all tangled and untangled in social webs and yarn webs for an evening before going home and realizing we did the last six rows of our (actually very simple!) lace shawl wrong, but also we won't care because we had fun chatting with our friends (both old and new) along...

events.title: Noodles Yarn Crafting
events.description:
Hello friends,

We're meeting at Noodles again! They are the same as always. You can try to knit with them if you order spaghetti. We'll be at the UNIVERSITY AVE (/Midvale) location, not any of the other Noodles, no matter what Meetup's useless location pin is telling you (everyone usually manages to find us, so I think I dragged it to the right spot, but always double check where you're going with these chain restaurants).

No one will see what you've written or give you unsolicited advice. ...

events.title: Cocktail Mix and Mingle Night
events.description: Join us at Madison After Dark Meetup Group's Cocktail Mix and Mingle Night to sip on delicious cocktails while making new friends . Whether you are new in town or a seasoned local, this event is perfect for socializing and networking in a fun and laid-back atmosphere. Our vibrant community of singles and social butterflies will create an inviting space for you to unwind and connect with like-minded individuals.

events.title: Trivia @ Schwoegler's Park Towne Lanes
events.description:
Join Team Random Facts for our usually weekly west side Monday night trivia at **Schwoegler's Park Towne Lanes**. (Occasional Mondays may be at other locations.)

Note the 7:00 start time, but try to arrive a bit early.

https://schwoegler.com/bar-and-grill/

events.title: Trivia Meetup @ Me&Julio in Fitchburg
events.description:
Do you enjoy eating delicious TexMex cuisine while a stranger asks you random questions? Great! Come on in and join us for trivia night at Me&Julio!

There's more than just Mexican food too. With burgers, chicken, steak & fish, soups & salads, vegetarian options, appetizers & desserts there's bound to be something for everyone.

Menu: https://www.meandjuliorestaurant.com/menu-fitchburg

Not sure you can contribute in a game of trivia? Consider this. If you are able to answer even one question...

events.title: Think Fast Trivia @ VFW Post 1318 "The V"
events.description:
Join Team Random Facts for **Think Fast Trivia, Madison's best trivia experience**. 80 fast paced questions organized in 8 categories, multiple choice or fill in the blank, audio and visual rounds as well as verbal questions, and a final question where we can risk it all.

See the photo section for a preview of some of this week's categories, and for information about the upcoming ***$1000 trivia competition.***

VFW posts are not just for veterans. All are welcome, and "The V" is a typical b...

events.title: Album Club: The Beatles, Rubber Soul (1965)
events.description:
With pick #35 on the Top 100, we turn to an album that quietly changed the direction of popular music: *Rubber Soul* by The Beatles.

Released in 1965, *Rubber Soul* feels like the moment when The Beatles began moving beyond the bright rush of early Beatlemania into something deeper, stranger, and more introspective.

The songs still sparkle with melody, but the themes are more grown-up — questions about identity, love, independence, and the shifting culture of the mid-1960s.
